Severity.description: Severity of a diagnostic, mirrored from §4.5 of the spec.

oneOf.description: Hardest level; by default causes a non-zero exit.

docs_url.description: Optional URL with docs or remediation guidance for the rule.

exclude.description: Exclusive gitignore-style globs removing files from the rule scope.

fix.description: Replacement text applied to the `@match` span for query-rule autofix.

forbid.description: Regex that raises a diagnostic for each match. Phase 2 runtime support.

id.description: Stable identifier for the rule. Optional in `*.rule.yaml`, required elsewhere.

include.description: Inclusive gitignore-style globs restricting where the rule applies.

language.description: Tree-sitter language used to compile a `query` rule.

message.description: User-facing diagnostic text, with `{{capture}}` interpolation for query rules.

multiline.description: Enables multiline / dotall regex behavior for match rules.

query.description: Tree-sitter query source for structural matching.

require.description: Regex that raises a diagnostic when absent from a file. Phase 2 runtime support.

severity.description: Diagnostic severity emitted when the rule matches.

tags.description: Free-form labels for grouping and filtering.
